cs.last_interaction_date) < 3 AND cs.output_tokens < 500 THEN 'abandoned' ELSE 'standard' END as session_archetype, toUInt8(round( 50 + (if(cs.git_sha IS NOT NULL AND cs.git_sha != '', 20, 0)) + (if((cs.output_tokens / nullif(cs.input_tokens, 0)) > 0.5, 15, 0)) + (least(toUInt32(length(cs.skills)), 3) * 5) - (if(cs.total_tokens > 1500000 AND (cs.git_sha IS NULL OR cs.git_sha = ''), 20, 0)) - (if(dateDiff('minute', cs.session_date, cs.last_interaction_date) < 2 AND cs.output_tokens < 200, 30, 0)) - (least(toUInt32( length(extractAll(cs.content, '"isApiErrorMessage":true')) + length(extractAll(cs.content, '"is_error":true')) ), 10) * 2) )) as success_score FROM rudel.claude_sessions AS cs WHERE length(_timestamps) > 0 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cs.session_id ORDER BY cs.ingested_at DESC) = 1;
